## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance is positive; new articles ranking well for target keywords](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Shift in focus: prioritize blog posts on use cases over integration/comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [New rich media capabilities (infographics, quotes, FAQs) to be integrated into content](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Team to research and prioritize high-value use cases (e.g., LMS) for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Delivery

  - [Impressions and clicks up; CTR needs improvement](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [16 articles delivered last week, 20 planned for this week (10 new, 5 integration, 5 comparison)](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [New content (e.g., Composable Commerce, Genwt) ranking well for target keywords](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Discussion on maintaining 10-12 blog posts/week cadence vs. current mix](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)

### Integration Pages and CTAs

  - [Format of integration pages reviewed; inline CTA code snippet to be implemented](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Some content too long for color coding; deemed acceptable](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Suggestion to add FAQs to integration pages for SEO improvement](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)

### Rich Media Integration

  - [New capability to generate infographics, Q\&A visuals, and bulleted lists](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Quote graphics suggested for highlighting key points or expert opinions](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [FAQs to be added at the bottom of content pages, especially integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Pivot from integration/comparison pages to use case-focused blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Target non-branded keywords for "how to build X with headless CMS"](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [Focus on high-value use cases (e.g., LMS, directory websites) with significant project budgets](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)

### AI/LLM Usage

  - [GrowthX using Strapi's Kappa API; consumption details to be clarified](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [GrowthX testing various AI tools for potential client offering](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)

### Backlink and Citation Tracking

  - [GrowthX exploring tools for measuring mentions and citations](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Plan to integrate visibility metrics into client dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sydney to develop use case content ideas for approval before team off-site](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Golzar to sync with sales/CS teams on top use cases with large ACV](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Paul and Theo to continue research on priority topics and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [Jason to clarify Kappa API usage with Daniel](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement rich media elements in upcoming content](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Team to select 5 articles for quote integration proof of concept](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [GrowthX to finalize AI tool selection for backlink/citation tracking](https://fathom.video/share/87xUqvzGnjzvbT7DuXBCNYUFeYcxf6x6?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
